preview.title: Preview
preview.empty: Enter promotion details to see a preview.

login.title: FoodFlow Admin
login.description: Sign in to manage the system
login.adminOnly: This dashboard is available to administrators only.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the admin email associated with your FoodFlow account.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If this account exists and email delivery is configured, reset instructions are on the way.
forgotPassword.neutralNotice: For security, FoodFlow does not reveal whether an email address exists.
forgotPassword.error: Could not request a password reset. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Create a new password
resetPassword.description: Use the secure one-time link from your FoodFlow email.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your admin password has been changed.
resetPassword.successNotice: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.missingToken: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new password reset email.
resetPassword.error: Could not reset the password. Please request a new link and try again.
